title: agrostis nigricans
intro: Agrostis nigricans, also known as black bent grass, is a type of grass species native to the Northern Hemisphere. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis nigricans include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and support immune function. Agrostis nigricans is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
